Title: Ask Copilot in security assessments now available
Author: Dylan Birtolo
EnhancedContent:
Organization admins and security managers can now jump into a Copilot experience directly from secret risk assessment or Code Security risk assessment results to get contextual explanations and guided next steps.

To learn more, visit our docs about running a [Code Security risk assessment](https://docs.github.com/code-security/concepts/code-scanning/code-security-risk-assessment) or [secret risk assessment](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/how-tos/secure-at-scale/configure-organization-security/configure-specific-tools/assess-your-secret-risk).
